titleStmt.title: SII 37.321: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 321. (A.R. No. B 428 of 1940-41.) Koṟṟapādu, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab near the wall close to the railway line.
This is dated in Śaka 1439, I7śvara, Jyēshṭha ba. 30, Thursday, solar eclipse, corresponding to 1517 A.D., June 19, however weekday was Friday.

It registers the gift of the village Tāḷḷapalle attached to Gaṇḍlūru belonging to Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sthaḷa by Sāḷuva Gōvindarāja vōḍeya, son of Rāchirājayya of Kauṇḍinya gōtra, Āpastaṁba sūtra and Yajuś śākhā for worshiping of god Raghunātha of Ghaṇḍikōṭa on the occasion of solar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī ja
yābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1439 Agunēṁṭi yīśvara saṁ
vatsara jēṣṭa ba 30 gu śrīmatu kauṁ
ḍinyagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbbhasūtraṁ yaju
śākhādhyāyulaina rācirāju Aya
komāruṁḍu sāḷuva gōviṁdarāju
voḍayalu ghaṁḍikōṭa raghunā
dhadēvuniki daṁḍdaṁ samarppiṁcci yiccina grāmadāna
śāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu śrīmanmahārājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrakṛṣna
rāyadēvamahārā sāmrā
jyamu sēyucunnu mā naku pāliṁ
ccana vadhariṁccina ghaṁḍikōṭa sthaḷānaku je
lle gaṁḍlūri grāmamulōni khaṁḍa tā
ḷlapalle grāmamu yī tathātidhi sūryyagrahaṇa
puṇyakālamaṁdu rācirāju Ayyagāriki pu
ṇyaṁgānu ghaṁḍikōṭa raghunāthadēvuni
ki sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvva
kamugānu tāḷlapalle grāmaṁ dhāravō
si yistimi

maniṁ
gu baḍi dharmaśāsa
yaṁcinānu
tali taṁḍḍilanu vā
ranāsilō vadhi
cina pāpānabō
vāru gaṁgakaru
ta gōbrāhma
la vadhiṁccni pā
pāna bōvāru maṁgaḷa
śrī śrī śrīṁ jē
yunu
Digital edition of SII 37.321 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
